required-output.evidence: Editable HTML and an 800x1000 PNG render exist.

rights-and-safety.evidence: Source URL, creator, Open Clip Art origin, and worldwide CC0 dedication are recorded.

anti-clone.evidence: No TWA/PARIS wording, draped central figure, split blue/cream field, sun face, airplane placement, Paris collage, or source typography remains.

render-integrity.evidence: The final 800x1000 render is nonblank; text and graphic regions remain within the canvas without incoherent overlap.

intent-alignment.evidence: Morning sun, mountain, northbound train, destination name, and departure copy express one travel promise.

functional-composition.evidence: The title anchors identity, landscape supplies context, track carries direction, train supplies action, and the footer resolves the promise.

visual-hierarchy-and-readability.evidence: Destination, sun, promise, and action have distinct levels and high-contrast fields at full size and in the thumbnail check.

delivery-context-fit.evidence: The 4:5 format, sparse copy, and strong destination label suit a contemporary social or station campaign placement.

originality-and-anti-clone.evidence: The output preserves symbolic compression and staged action while changing every protected or distinctive concrete axis.

unresolved_assumptions: Audience recognition, brand fit, and campaign performance remain untested.
The generated skill remains experimental because its extraction corpus has one source.
